plugins.name: engineering
plugins.description: Role bundle for software engineering — commit hygiene, incident postmortems, plus GitHub and browser-automation connectors.

plugins.name: productivity
plugins.description: Plan your day and capture work — meeting notes, standups, TL;DRs, with local filesystem and knowledge-graph memory.

plugins.name: writing
plugins.description: Sharpen written communication — polish emails, explain simply (ELI5), and summarize long text.

plugins.name: product-management
plugins.description: PM workflows — weigh trade-offs, run meetings, keep stakeholders updated, tied to GitHub and Linear.

plugins.name: support
plugins.description: Triage and resolve — incident postmortems and crisp summaries, wired to Sentry for error context.

plugins.name: research
plugins.description: Structured investigation — step-by-step reasoning and knowledge-graph memory with summarize + pros/cons skills.
